top_signals.title: Apple unveils ‘Siri AI’ in challenge to rival chatbots
top_signals.summary: Silicon Valley giant promises user privacy as it makes long-delayed overhaul of voice assistant
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Unpaid carers could get maternity-style ‘right to return’ to work
top_signals.summary: Paid leave for employees who quit to look after a friend or relative among protections being considered by government
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley Sees LNG Upside Risks as Asian Demand Picks Up
top_signals.summary: Liquefied natural gas prices are set to climb to levels not seen in more than three years as hotter weather in Asia and restocking needs in Europe boost demand, according to Morgan Stanley.

top_signals.title: Congo says Ebola deaths top 100 as armed groups threaten response
top_signals.summary: The outbreak of the Bundibugyo ​strain of Ebola was announced on May 15, though ‌officials have ‌since said it went undetected for weeks.
